scope.summary: Build validation harnesses and negative cases for mixed cloud/local/subagent lane runs.
forbidden_paths: live cloud dependency in required tests
tests that pass through mocks while claiming live-cloud proof
npm/JavaScript proof targets for this WP
app/src-tauri launch or IPC authority for this WP
proof commands that pass with zero matching tests
acceptance_criteria: Tests cover local-only, cloud-only fake, mixed fake cloud/local, subagent, validator lane, disagreement, cloud consent block, missing payload, orphan, restart, and cancellation cases.
Live cloud tests, if added, are explicitly ignored or env-gated and never required for CI.
Negative tests assert CX-MM-006..009 failstate behavior.

MT-009 tests MUST assert every local/cloud/CLI/subagent lane uses ModelRuntime/adapter fakes shaped like production adapters, emits bounded ProcessOwnershipLedger start/stop/overflow evidence, honors cooperative cancellation between streaming chunks/tool-call boundaries, rejects unbounded retry, and proves no direct endpoint or app/src authority path is used.

Validation MUST include deterministic fake mixed-agent CRDT tests: two model lanes plus an operator lane emit Yjs-compatible updates against the same document; replay applies updates in varied order and with duplicates; final materialized state and state_vector are stable; stale base_snapshot_ref/state_vector promotion is denied; snapshot compaction preserves update hashes, state vectors, and replay metadata.

MT-009 negative tests MUST prove ModelLaneRun replay from PostgreSQL/EventLedger when Flight Recorder rows, provider trace history, terminal scrollback, and chat history are unavailable. Tests MUST assert trace_id/span_id continuity and ModelLaneMessage producer/consumer span links for local-only, mixed cloud/local, subagent, orphan, restart, missing-payload, and cancellation cases.

Validation proves same-change UserManual entries and HBR-INT-009 diagnostic posture for all behavior-changing MTs; missing internal_diagnostics/Palmistry is an explicit DEFERRED-with-reason evidence row, not a skipped check.
Live provider/cloud tests are optional env-gated checks; CI authority comes from deterministic fakes plus real PostgreSQL/EventLedger where storage authority is being proven.

MT-009 MUST include WP-wide Rust integration proof: create mixed local/cloud/subagent run with deterministic provider fakes, persist PostgreSQL/EventLedger/ArtifactStore/CRDT state, restart/replay, inspect through Rust native Argus diagnostics, verify backend counts match UI rows, and verify UserManual coverage matrix for every behavior/event/schema.

Negative proof gates are mandatory for missing Locus binding, launch bypass/direct endpoint, direct authority mutation, stale CRDT base, missing/expired/revoked consent, corrupt checkpoint/replay order, Argus missing surface/backend count mismatch, and stale UserManual code-truth references.

After implementation and before READY_FOR_VALIDATION, this MT MUST receive post-implementation adversarial review against the actual diff. Findings must be fixed or converted into explicit lifecycle blocker/missing_resource/proof_status state; the implementer may not self-certify COMPLETED.
scope.risk_if_missed: The feature can appear designed but fail under the exact mixed-lane scenarios it exists to support.

implementation_notes: Required tests must use deterministic fake local/cloud/subagent adapters; live cloud/provider checks may exist only as ignored or env-gated tests.

Negative fixtures must cover false PASS, stale state, missing PostgreSQL/EventLedger persistence, missing payload artifact, missing consent/projection, secret/raw prompt leakage, parallel write conflict, UI overlap, orphan lane, and provider missing feature.
Run at least two concurrent lanes plus simulated operator edit against touched shared state.
If migrations or tests require PostgreSQL extensions or tool prerequisites, update HANDSHAKE_BUILD_RULES.json test_environment_prerequisites and fail loud at setup/migration time.
Validation must prove no SQLite runtime/test/fixture/fallback/cache path was introduced.
Temporal-style deterministic replay means tests must separate recorded adapter activity from routing-state replay; random or provider-current outputs cannot be required for replay pass.
MCP-style tool boundaries mean negative tests must include unauthorized peer channels and tool calls that bypass capability/consent/logging.
No SQLite runtime/test/fixture/fallback/cache authority is allowed for this WP; if a test cannot use PostgreSQL/EventLedger, it must be marked not authoritative and cannot satisfy acceptance.
Use Flight Recorder/EventLedger payloads as bounded events plus artifact refs; do not put unbounded model output, raw secrets, or prompt-only state in event payloads.

If this MT changes any product behavior, storage/event contract, command, IPC/API path, diagnostic surface, model lane, or navigation path, update the in-product UserManual in the same implementation change per HBR-MAN-004.

Product implementation for this MT must be Rust-only: Rust backend plus Rust native egui/Argus surfaces where UI is touched. Legacy app/src, app/src-tauri, React, Tauri/WebView, TypeScript, JavaScript, docs/model-manual, and npm proof targets are reference-only or forbidden and MUST NOT satisfy implementation/proof authority.

Proof commands must name exact Rust test targets or exact test names. Zero matching tests is a hard failure. Deterministic provider fakes are allowed for cloud/local model calls, but PostgreSQL/EventLedger/ArtifactStore/CRDT/UserManual/Argus authority must touch real Handshake-owned Rust resources or an explicit real PostgreSQL URL.
Each behavior-changing MT must include same-change UserManual coverage for the changed behavior; MT-011 audits coverage and cannot substitute for same-change HBR-MAN-004 proof.

This pre-implementation contract review does not replace post-implementation review. After coding, run adversarial review against the actual diff through the listed lenses and update MT status signaling before handoff.

risks: Fake cloud tests can accidentally validate only local code paths.
minimum_controls: Use deterministic fake adapters for required coverage and label live provider checks optional.

research_basis.authority_posture: Master spec/SPEC_CURRENT/product code are authority; HANDSHAKE_PRODUCT_REFERENCE.md and external research are navigation/evidence only.
product_code_evidence: src/backend/handshake_core/tests/user_manual_* tests require live PostgreSQL/EventLedger for UserManual proof

external_sources_checked.name: Hugging Face Candle Rust ML runtime

patterns_applied: Typed multi-agent orchestration becomes ModelLaneRun/ModelLane/ModelLaneMessage records, never peer-to-peer chat authority.
Durable workflow/replay patterns become PostgreSQL/EventLedger aggregates, checkpoints, projections, and deterministic state transitions.
CRDT research becomes explicit draft/proposal/update/state-vector/snapshot/stale-base records before promotion.
Trace/span research becomes propagated trace_id/span_id/model_session_id/lane_id correlation across lanes, tools, providers, artifacts, and diagnostics.
Tool protocol research becomes Handshake capability check, consent/projection, Flight Recorder/EventLedger logging, execution, result capture, and recovery.
rejected_options: peer-to-peer model channels outside coordinator-owned ModelLaneMessage records
legacy app/src React/Tauri code as runtime authority
SQLite runtime/test/fixture/cache/fallback authority for this WP
Flight Recorder-only replay without PostgreSQL/EventLedger authority rows
manual or markdown prose as product runtime authority
research_basis.selected_handshake_translation: Validation must prove deterministic mixed local/cloud/subagent execution, CRDT replay invariants, process ownership/cancellation, consent denial, orphan recovery, no SQLite fallback, UserManual currency, and three-tier diagnostic evidence.

handshake_compatibility.product_reference_file_posture: reference/navigation only; do not override SPEC_CURRENT, master spec, build rules, or product code evidence
handshake_compatibility.proposal_promotion_model: Models may propose, critique, summarize, and produce artifacts; Handshake validates/promotes deterministically through Rust backend authority surfaces before state becomes authoritative.
durable_authority: CRDT/write-box when shared editable state is touched
observability_required: HBR-INT-009 tier posture for Flight Recorder, internal_diagnostics, Palmistry
handshake_compatibility.no_context_model_requirement: A model with no chat history must be able to implement and verify this MT from this contract, SPEC_CURRENT/master spec, product code paths, UserManual/backend navigation, and listed proof targets.
handshake_compatibility.rust_only_implementation: Rust backend plus Rust native egui/Argus only. TypeScript/React/app/src/app-src-tauri/npm/docs-model-manual are not implementation or proof authority for this WP.
handshake_compatibility.spec_realism_gate: Implementer may move only to READY_FOR_VALIDATION after exact Rust proof targets touch the named real resources; COMPLETED is validator-only.
